chatbot.welcome:
NoorGrid RAG · STEG knowledge base online.

I can answer questions using STEG operating specs, grid capacity data, maintenance records, the August 14 crisis postmortem, and Tunisia's renewable investment pipeline.

Ask me anything about the national grid, blackout risk, renewable resources, or energy policy.

crisisIntel.title: CRISIS INTELLIGENCE
crisisIntel.subtitle: Incident log and regional exposure analysis

about.heroSub: NoorGrid is not a dashboard. It is the intelligence layer that never existed.
about.problemPara1: On August 14, 2024 at 15:41, Tunisia's national grid hit a record 4,888 MW demand against an effective capacity of 4,636 MW. Algeria covered a 252 MW gap via the interconnector. Without it, Tunisia faces cascading outage risk.
about.problemPara2: This is not hypothetical. It happens every summer. Tunisia has wind farms, solar plants, and hydro dams across 24 governorates, but monitoring is isolated with no unified real-time view, no prediction, and no prevention.
about.quote: There is no digital tracking system for these networks. And there is no prevention culture.
about.quoteAuthor: Senior official, STEG Renewable Energy Division
about.teamDesc: Built NoorGrid end-to-end — FastAPI backend, digital twin model, blackout prediction engine, and full-stack infrastructure.
about.solution1Desc: Real-time virtual replica of Tunisia's grid. IoT sensor fusion, time-sensitive physical modeling, and automated drone deployment on anomaly detection.
about.solution2Desc: 72h forecasting using OpenMeteo weather data, peak-hour demand curves, and STEG capacity constants to prevent failures before they happen.
about.solution3Desc: Tunisia's first governorate-level carbon score built from real billing data and live renewable output.
about.messageSentSub: We will contact you to schedule a demonstration with your team.
about.messagePlaceholder: Describe your organization and use case…

landing.heroSub: Real-time digital twin · Outage prediction · National carbon index · AI investment strategy
landing.pillarsTitle: The intelligence layer that never existed.
landing.feature1Desc: Real-time virtual replica of Tunisia's renewable grid across 24 governorates. IoT sensor fusion across wind farms, solar plants, and hydro dams. Automated drone deployment on anomaly detection.
landing.feature2Desc: 72h forecasting engine using live temperature data, peak-hour demand curves, and STEG capacity constants. The system that could have alerted operators 72h before August 14, 2024.
landing.feature3Desc: Tunisia's first regional carbon score—computed per governorate from real STEG billing data, live weather, and renewable output.
landing.quote: There is no digital tracking system for these networks. And there is no prevention culture.
landing.quoteAuthor: Senior official, STEG Renewable Energy Division
landing.footerSub: NoorGrid turns Tunisia's energy blind spot into a major strategic advantage.
